top_signals.title: Ask Gideon Rachman a question — Has the Iran war changed the world order?
top_signals.summary: Take part in a live Ask an Expert Q&A with the FT’s chief foreign affairs commentator on Tuesday July 7 at 10.30am BST
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Flipper Zero firmware development continues with community help
top_signals.summary: Flipper Devices says development of the Flipper Zero firmware will continue, albeit with a smaller internal team and greater reliance on community contributions. [...]
